overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing continuous walking through a futuristic commercial lobby, transitioning into a heavy orange smog-filled urban street with palm trees and highway overpasses, crossing roads beneath the overpass, and entering a covered plaza with purple neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern commercial lobby with digital displays and neon lighting

events.description: exits indoor lobby through glass doors into heavy orange atmospheric smog

agents.ego_description: walking through a sleek modern lobby with digital billboards and central potted plants, approaching the glass exit doors

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement showing an astronaut figure with orange text
tall bamboo plant in a rectangular planter with pink neon accent lighting
square pink neon light fixture mounted on the ceiling
large glass exit doors leading to the exterior street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a modern commercial lobby with polished marble floors and digital billboards. The camera moves forward past a central bamboo plant with pink neon lighting, approaching glass exit doors. The space is empty of pedestrians and illuminated by artificial neon fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside elevated highway in heavy orange smog

events.description: emerges from indoor lighting into heavy orange atmospheric haze significantly reducing visibility
slight turn to the right while navigating around pedestrians on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk next to a massive highway overpass, passing palm trees and vertical billboards in the dense orange smog

notable_agents.action: person wearing bright neon green pants walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure running parallel to the sidewalk
tall palm trees lining the street visible through the orange haze
tall vertical digital billboard displaying WET DREAM advertisement with purple text
modern street lighting poles along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building, the scene transitions dramatically to an outdoor urban environment engulfed in heavy orange smog. The camera walks along a concrete sidewalk beside a massive highway overpass, passing tall palm trees and a prominent vertical billboard. Pedestrians walk in the opposing direction through the hazy atmosphere, and the visibility decreases as the camera progresses along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing beneath massive concrete overpass structure

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street at a marked yellow crosswalk beneath the overpass
approaching and entering a covered commercial plaza with distinct purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk and continuing beneath the highway overpass, navigating through scattered pedestrians

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
traffic signal pole with pedestrian crossing lights
cars parked along the street beneath the overpass
covered shelter structure for public transit

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street at a marked crosswalk, moving beneath the massive concrete overpass structure. The lighting becomes darker and more shadowed under the highway, with parked vehicles visible on the right. The orange smog persists but the environment feels more enclosed. The camera continues forward toward a covered plaza entrance with visible purple neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial plaza with purple neon accent lighting

events.description: enters covered plaza where purple neon strip lighting replaces the orange smog atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking through a wide covered plaza between two commercial structures with prominent purple neon lighting, following other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person on bicycle riding through the plaza ahead of the camera

entered.detail: covered walkway structure with columns on the left side of the plaza
covered walkway structure with columns on the right side with digital billboards
horizontal purple neon light strips under the roof canopies
large digital advertisement screens on the right side structure

segments.scene_description: Entering the covered plaza, the lighting shifts dramatically to purple neon strips under the roof canopies. The camera walks along a wide paved pathway between two commercial structures with digital billboards. The orange smog is no longer visible, replaced by the artificial neon glow. Pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, including a person on a bicycle, as the camera continues through the futuristic commercial space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sterile, modern interior into a smog-choked urban exterior and finally into a neon-lit plaza. It begins in a polished commercial lobby with marble floors and pink neon accents, moving forward past a central bamboo plant toward the glass exit doors. As the camera steps outside, the environment transitions dramatically into a hazy urban street engulfed in heavy orange smog, where the camera walks past tall palm trees and a massive highway overpass. The scene then shifts into deeper shadows as the camera crosses a marked street beneath the concrete overpass, moving through the persistent orange haze toward a distant glow. Finally, the camera enters a covered plaza where the smog vanishes, replaced by a vibrant purple neon atmosphere and wide paved pathways lined with digital billboards.
